title: Invitation Homes Makes Leadership Changes to Prepare for Growth
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) today announced it is making several leadership changes to address continued growth and prepare for future expansion. “Our business continues to grow and mature, creating opportunities to build on our excellent operational foundation,” said Charles Young, President and Chief Operating Officer. “With our current growth trajectory and plans for continued expansion, it's imperative that we're organize.

title: Why Invitation Homes Stock Is Falling Today
text: Invitation Homes beat sales forecasts, but its adjusted funds from operations fell short of expectations. The REIT's valuation is also likely being impacted by bearish pressures seizing the broader stock market.

title: Invitation Home (INVH) Lags Q3 FFO Estimates
text: Invitation Home (INVH) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $0.44 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.45 per share. This compares to FFO of $0.42 per share a year ago.

title: Invitation Homes Reports Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”), the nation's premier single-family home leasing company, today announced its Q3 2023 financial and operating results, along with the Company's updated 2023 full year guidance. Third Quarter 2023 Highlights Year over year, total revenues increased 8.6% to $618 million, property operating and maintenance costs increased 12.6% to $229 million, net income available to common stockholders increased 66.

title: 2 REITs That Could Be Takeover Targets
text: REITs offer an opportunity to buy real estate at a discount. Private equity players are already taking advantage of this. We highlight 2 likely buyout candidates.

title: Invitation Homes Announces Cash Dividend
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) announced today that it has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.26 per share payable on shares of its common stock. The dividend will be paid on or before November 22, 2023, to stockholders of record of the Company's common stock as of the close of business on November 7, 2023. title: Invitation Homes Announces Dates for Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) will release its third quarter 2023 financial and operating results on Wednesday, October 25, 2023, after the market closes. The Company will host a webcast and conference call on Thursday, October 26, 2023, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to review third quarter results, discuss recent events, and conduct a question-and-answer session. title: After Plunging -8.27% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for Invitation Home (INVH)
text: Invitation Home (INVH) is technically in oversold territory now, so the heavy selling pressure might have exhausted. This along with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in raising earnings estimates could lead to a trend reversal for the stock.

title: This High-Quality Dividend Stock Looks Cheap (Even if There's a Recession)
text: Invitation Homes trades at a 21% discount to its net asset value. That's cheap, especially for a REIT that should continue growing even in a recession.

title: Run, Don't Walk To These 5 Sweet REIT Bargains
text: REITs have experienced a significant decline in the past month, making it the 3rd worst bear market in the last 25 years. The crash in REITs is attributed to long-term rates roaring higher at the fastest rate in at least 20 years. The best blue-chip REITs will profit from the end of "free money forever." When the market realizes this, deep value REITs will likely rocket higher.
